'''''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 0''' was a preview to the ''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]'' comic, released before the beginning of the miniseries' run and included in the trade paperback by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. Set shortly before [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], and over four years before the rest of the comic, Issue 0 shows [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] planning an infiltration mission to spy on [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], and shows [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] introducing her to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for the first time.
